title: monarda pratensis
intro: Monarda pratensis, commonly known as wild bergamot or bee balm, is a perennial herb native to North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects, which make it useful for treating wounds, skin irritations, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Monarda pratensis include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce stress and anxiety, and alleviate symptoms of digestive disorders. Herbal preparations of Monarda pratensis can be made into teas, infusions, tinctures, and salves, allowing for various uses in natural remedies.
